ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for the geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for the geographical location */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases reported on that date */,
  "recovered_count" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province/state */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_region FOREIGN KEY ("country_region") REFERENCES countries ("country_region"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_province_state FOREIGN KEY ("province_state") REFERENCES provinces ("province_state")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province or state */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region the province/state is located in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province/state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "healthcare_index" REAL /* Healthcare quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province/state associated with the trend */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date of the trend entry */,
  "daily_cases" INTEGER /* Number of daily reported cases on that date */,
  "recovered_trend" INTEGER /* Daily recovered cases */,
  "death_trend" INTEGER /* Daily deaths */,
  "test_trend" INTEGER /* Daily tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_trends_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
